div.head: The Ambassador in Chile (Culbertson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 20. My telegram No. 19, January 31, 7 p.m., and Department’s instruction No. 1449 air mail January 15th [19th].Instruction No. 1449 not printed. Proposed law will result in advantage to certain British interests. Conversations with members of British Embassy and with American nitrate representative indicate that we cannot count on British diplomacy in this issue. On other issues this may not be the case but there is no indication that Ross’ program is meeting with British opposition.
